{{Quote|And then there's the Boiling Sea and Drall, and the Cloudland Peaks on Selonia, and the Gold Beaches on Corellia.|[[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]]|<ref name="Ambush at Corellia">''[[Ambush at Corellia]]''</ref>}}
The '''Cloudland Peaks''' were a series of towering mountain ranges on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Selonia/Legends|Selonia]].

Consisting of five [[Volcano/Legends|volcanic]] islands in the far northern latitudes, many of these mountain peaks extended up into the upper [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmosphere]] of the planet. The name Cloudland derives from the way the mountains seem to "pierce the sky." The higher elevations were shrouded in cloud and mist, and the peaks frequently rose above the cloud cover entirely. [[Temperature/Legends|Temperatures]] at these levels ranged from –10° C in the day to –45° C at night. These treacherous peaks attracted adventurous climbers from [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]] and other [[Star system/Legends|star systems]] and were one of Selonia's only tourist spots.
